signature_dishes.title: Roasted Beet Salad
signature_dishes.description: Roasted beet salad / whipped goat cheese / orange segments / beets grumble
signature_dishes.chef_story: A classic starter that celebrates the natural sweetness of roasted beets with creamy goat cheese.

signature_dishes.title: Homemade Spinach Ricotta Ravioli
signature_dishes.description: Ravioli, spinach almonds puree, creamy ricotta cheese, black butter sage
signature_dishes.chef_story: A homemade pasta masterpiece combining Italian tradition with modern presentation.

signature_dishes.title: Slow Cook Short Ribs
signature_dishes.description: Slow cook short ribs / baby carrots / purple mash potatoes / homemade jus
signature_dishes.chef_story: Tender, melt-in-your-mouth short ribs slow-cooked for hours to perfection with house-made jus.
signature_dishes.pairing: Cabernet Sauvignon or Côtes du Rhône

signature_dishes.title: Butterfly Pink Prawn
signature_dishes.description: Butterfly pink prawn / lemon potato mousseline / beet jus reduction / beet foam
signature_dishes.chef_story: Delicately presented with artistic beet foam and silky potato mousseline.

signature_dishes.title: Stuffed Corn Fed Chicken Breast
signature_dishes.description: Stuffed corn feed chicken breast / pepper sauce / spinach almonds sauce / chicken crisp touilles
signature_dishes.chef_story: Premium corn-fed chicken with multiple layers of flavor and elegant presentation.
signature_dishes.pairing: Côtes du Provence or Pinot Noir

signature_dishes.title: Red Carpet
signature_dishes.description: Beets and water melon cubes, nectarine, beet glaze, aged balsamic glaze, goat cheese piping
signature_dishes.chef_story: A vibrant, colorful dish that combines sweet and savory elements beautifully.

signature_dishes.title: Japanese Style Seared Tuna
signature_dishes.description: Japanese style seared tuna unagi glaze served with pickled red cabbage, pea puree and fresh sweet pea
signature_dishes.chef_story: Expertly seared tuna with a Japanese twist - perfectly rare and bursting with umami flavors.

signature_dishes.title: Original Caesar Salad
signature_dishes.chef_story: A timeless classic executed with precision and premium ingredients.

signature_dishes.title: Blue Cheese Linguine
signature_dishes.description: Blue cheese linguine served with yellow and green zucchini puree / fresh zucchini and stuffed zucchini flour
signature_dishes.chef_story: Bold flavors with creamy blue cheese balanced by fresh zucchini puree.

signature_dishes.title: Royal Sushi
signature_dishes.description: Royal sushi: assorted sushi with tuna, king crab, sardines, avocado cucumber, salmon topping with royal white caviar
signature_dishes.chef_story: A luxurious sushi selection featuring premium seafood and white caviar.

signature_dishes.title: Blue Cheese Chicken Lollipop
signature_dishes.description: Blue cheese Chicken lollipop, spiced crunchy baked chicken, creamy bleu cheese sauce, bleu cheese, sliced lime
signature_dishes.chef_story: Crispy on the outside, creamy blue cheese sauce inside - a modern twist on a classic.

signature_dishes.title: Mediterranean Baby Octopus
signature_dishes.description: Mediterranean baby octopus, eggplant puree, corn socotage, balsamic glaze
signature_dishes.chef_story: Tender baby octopus with Mediterranean flavors and artistic plating.
